  layer0=Linear( # Param: 360,297,342 (1.4 GB)
    kernel=Param( # 360,278,361 (1.4 GB)
      value=Array(shape=(18981, 18981), dtype=dtype('float32'))
    ),

      value=Array(shape=(18981,), dtype=dtype('float32'))
    ),

    precision=None,

Maybe the hints set does not contain a good representative set of valid configs?Working around this by using the full hints set instead.
